button.label: Record
button.name: btn_record
button.tool_tip: Record the live camera (flycam, mouse, or cinematic) into a take

button.label: Play
button.name: btn_play
button.tool_tip: Play or pause the recorded take (takes over the camera)

button.label: Stop
button.name: btn_stop
button.tool_tip: Stop and give the camera back

slider.label: Time
slider.name: scrub_slider
slider.tool_tip: Scrub through the take. Dragging while stopped previews that moment

slider.label: Speed
slider.name: FlycamRecSpeed
slider.tool_tip: Playback speed multiplier (0.5 = slow motion, 2 = double time)

combo_box.name: FlycamRecLoopMode
combo_box.tool_tip: What happens when playback reaches the end of the take

check_box.label: Smooth splines
check_box.name: FlycamRecSmooth
check_box.tool_tip: Catmull-Rom / squad interpolation between keyframes. Uncheck for straight linear segments

combo_box.name: FlycamRecAnchorMode
combo_box.tool_tip: Where the path plays: at its recorded world position, or re-anchored to a subject. Anchored modes map the path's offsets from the recording avatar onto the new anchor

check_box.label: Follow anchor
check_box.name: FlycamRecFollowAnchor
check_box.tool_tip: Re-anchor every frame so the whole move rides a walking avatar or moving object

check_box.label: Handheld operator layer on playback
check_box.name: FlycamRecUseOperator
check_box.tool_tip: Route playback through the procedural handheld operator. Record a clean pass with the operator off, then add the texture here

slider.label: Sample rate (Hz)
slider.name: FlycamRecSampleRate
slider.tool_tip: Keyframes captured per second. 30 is plenty with smoothing on; lower makes smaller, easier-to-hand-edit files

button.label: Save...
button.name: btn_save
button.tool_tip: Save the take to a hand-editable XML file

button.label: Load...
button.name: btn_load
button.tool_tip: Load a take from an XML file
